title: store.update_space_fully: existence check before writes is correct
description: store.rs update_space_fully and update_contact_fully check existence inside the transaction before any writes. This is correct: without it, a member-only patch on a nonexistent space would insert orphaned space_member rows and return Ok(true). The transaction-internal existence check prevents the TOCTOU between the caller's existence check and the writes. A future contributor might remove this as 'redundant' since callers also check existence; do not - the store must be self-consistent regardless of caller behavior.
